title: Wooden Bat Set
features: 🍉🍍🎾🏃 TWO FUN BATS AND BALL SET - Have fun in the sun with these colourful fruit themed wooden bats and ball! Featuring two attractive designs one being a pineapple and the other a watermelon! Perfect to take down the park, beach or on holiday. Feel summery with these bright wooden paddles
🍉🍍🎾🏃 SCREEN FREE OUTDOOR GAMES - Perfect to play a variety of outdoor ball games in the garden, park, or beach! A great choice to help improve hand-eye coordination and cultivate great motor skills

🍉🍍🎾🏃 FUN WOODEN BEACH BAT AND BALL GAME - Each measure approximately 38cm in length. Easy to pack! Perfect outdoor game with the kids. Take these wherever you go for on demand fun! They’re lightweight so are a perfect choice to put in any beach bag or rucksack
🍉🍍🎾🏃 GREAT FUN CHILDRENS BAT AND BALL SET - Suitable for children aged 3 years and above. Great quality material made from high quality plywood and plastic made for a long life and endless fun
🍉🍍🎾🏃 HIGH QUALITY PADDLES - The whole bat is a single piece of wood with a robust construction, plastic stippled moulds on the handles to make them grippy and very comfortable to hold
description: TWO FUN BATS AND BALL SET - Have fun in the sun with these colourful fruit themed wooden bats and ball! Featuring two attractive designs one being a pineapple and the other a watermelon! Perfect to take down the park, beach or on holiday. Feel summery with these bright wooden paddles. SCREEN FREE OUTDOOR GAMES - Perfect to play a variety of outdoor ball games in the garden, park, or beach! A great choice to help improve hand-eye coordination and cultivate great motor skills. FUN WOODEN PADDLE AND BALL GAME - Each measure approximately 38cm in length. Easy to pack! Perfect for beach holiday with the kids. Take these wherever you go for on demand fun! They’re lightweight so are a perfect choice to put in any beach bag or rucksack. GREAT FUN CHILDRENS BAT AND BALL SET: Suitable for children aged 3 years and above. Great quality material made from high quality plywood and plastic made for a long life and endless fun. HIGH QUALITY PADDLES - Wide bats with a high-quality ball with lots of ping for its pong. The whole bat is a single piece of wood for a robust construction, plastic stippled moulds on the handles to make them grippy and very comfortable to hold.
